import React, { useContext, useEffect, useState } from 'react' import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import { Footer } from './Footer'; import { Navbar } from './Navbar'; import SweetAlertContext from "../context/sweetalert/SweetAlertContext"; export const Contact = (props) => { const {contactalert, toggle, addminus } = useContext(SweetAlertContext); const [contacts, setcontacts] = useState({ namee: "", email: "", message: "" }) useEffect(() => { addminus() }) useEffect(() => { toggle() }, []) const onChange = (e) => { setcontacts({ ...contacts, [e.target.name]: e.target.value }) } const handleSubmit = async (e) => { e.preventDefault(); const { namee, email, message } = contacts const response = await fetch(`http://localhost:5000/api/profile/addcontact`, { method: "POST", headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', "auth-token": localStorage.getItem('token') }, body: JSON.stringify({ namee, email, message }), }); const contact = await response.json() setcontacts(contact); if (contact.success) { contactalert() setcontacts({ namee: "", email: "", message: "" }) // window.location.reload() } } return ( <>
